hero.bridging: Haɗa Kai Don Haɗa Kai A Nijeriya
hero.title: Haɗa Kowa da
hero.subtitle: Sabobin kuɗi na dijital da ke da sauƙi, tsaro, da araha a cikin harshen Hausa da Turanci.

stats.targetUsers: Masu Amfani da Aka Yi Nufi

problem.title: Rikicin Warewar Kudi
problem.subtitle: Kashi 40% na manyan ‘yan Najeriya ba su da banki. Arewacin Najeriya ne ke dauke da nauyi mafi girma.

unbanked.title: Kashi 65% ba su da banki a Arewa
unbanked.desc: Miliyoyin masu aiki tukuru a Arewacin Najeriya ba su da damar samun ayyukan kuɗi na yau da kullun.

languageBarrier.title: Shamakin Harshe
languageBarrier.desc: Yawancin manhajojin fintech na Turanci ne kawai, ban da al'ummomin da ke magana da Hausa daga hada-hadar kuɗi na zamani.

trustDeficit.title: Gibin Amincewa
trustDeficit.desc: Damuwar al'adu da addini game da harkokin banki na yau da kullun na hana tallafi a cikin al'ummomin karkara.

dashboard.subtitle: Bibiyar ci gaban ku da sarrafa kuɗin ku.
